intent: Move incoming proposals (issues, requests, agent-generated suggestions) through a small state machine — gather, recommend, verify, grill if needed, apply — until each carries exactly one category and one state; every rejection writes its reason to a rejection log so it is never re-proposed.

state.item: object — the proposal under triage: full body, prior triage notes, reporter activity
state.verification: object | null — what reproducing or checking the claim actually showed
state.brief: string | null — the durable agent brief when the outcome is ready-for-agent
state.rejection_reason: string | null — required before a wontfix may close

edges.when: redundancy check found it already implemented, or the rejection log already covers it — short-circuit to wontfix with pointer
maintainer accepts recommendation and the claim is checkable
maintainer wants the request fleshed out
maintainer overrides with an explicit state
claim verified but shape still fuzzy
verification settles the state (confirmed → brief; insufficient detail → needs-info)
exactly one category + one state applied; wontfix carries its logged reason; ready-for-agent carries its brief

termination: the item reaches a terminal state (ready-for-agent, ready-for-human, wontfix) or a waiting state (needs-info, which re-enters at gatherer on reporter reply); never ends with zero or two state roles
